text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.title: Better Mace Swap Config
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.au: Automatically swap to Mace when hitting with a Sword or Axe.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.sm: Automatically picks Density when falling and Breach when on the ground.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.br: Ticks to wait before swapping back to your previous item.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.au: Automatically Axe-stun then Mace-slam when hitting a shield.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.co: Enable auto-swaps and stun logic against players.
Enable auto-swaps and stun logic against mobs and animals.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.ma: Prioritized enchantment when Smart Switch is OFF.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.at: Decide if swaps trigger on all items or just weapons.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.wi: Right-clicking with a weapon fires a Wind Charge from inventory.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.pe: Fire a Wind Charge after throwing an Ender Pearl while looking up.
Ticks to wait after pearl throw before firing Wind Charge.
Minimum pitch angle to trigger Pearl Catch.
Which slot to return to after a pearl/wind combo.
text.autoconfig.bettermaceswap.option.ai: Smoothly tracks targets while falling for Mace slams.
How fast the crosshair moves toward the target.
The strength of the aim correction.
Blocks you must fall before Aim Assist activates.
